TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Qapedang, title = Qapedang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qapedang} }

S.FORM: alang Qapedang ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Taybu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 308 buwan, 1,146 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 1,119 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Qapedang hya' ga Kaviyangan. tay mkyahu' na Qapedang hya' ga Piyuma. tay 'llaw na Qapedang hya' ga Ulaljuc. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Qapedang ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Taybu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 308 buwan, 1,146 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 1,119 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Qapedang hya' ga Kaviyangan. tay mkyahu' na Qapedang hya' ga Piyuma. tay 'llaw na Qapedang hya' ga Ulaljuc. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ qape*aЕ‹ ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku Д§eto keЕ‹ atu tajОІu ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa *** ОІuwan, *,*** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *,*** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa *% kjan ku ** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, pajwan **%, ОІunun *%, amis~Й• *%, ОІinaД§ liД§ujan s~Й•К”uli *%. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj mkrajaК” na qape*aЕ‹ Д§jaК” ЙЈa ka*ijaЕ‹an. taj mkjaД§uК” na qape*aЕ‹ Д§jaК” ЙЈa pijuma. taj К”llaw na qape*aЕ‹ Д§jaК” ЙЈa ulaljuК¦~КЁ. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj maki * pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj. pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й• tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
